    def eligible_for_graduate_fellowship(self) -> bool:
        eligible_genders = {'female', 'non-binary', 'transgender'}
        eligible_education = {'master', 'doctor'}
        eligible_employment = {'student', 'unemployed'}
        
        return (self.gender in eligible_genders and
                self.age <= 45 and
                self.race in {'black', 'hispanic', 'indian'} and
                self.employment_status in eligible_employment and
                self.education in eligible_education and
                self.marital_status in {'single', 'divorced', 'legally separated'} and
                self.religion != 'atheist' and
                self.GPA >= 3.8 and
                self.research_publications == 'yes')
